fields.summary: SMS Magic in lower envs (UAT, QA, DEV) access and licenses

content.text: In Salesforce QA, UAT (and probably dev) the SMS Magic converse shows a banner saying trial expired. When I proxy login as a user with SMS access I send messages but they don’t seem to be going anywhere.
Also, it seems I do not have a license for my account. The engineering and qa team need licenses that work in our lower envs, with at minimum full integration in UAT.

content.text: We have assigned your request HEAL-33098 to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.

Sean , this  ticket has been with me for along while. I haven’t had a chance to adress it. Can you wrk on this please?
